# 5D Labs

> 5D Labs is an AI-native venture studio powered by an internal operating stack. CTO is the build engine, the internal trading engine helps finance experimentation and sharpen market intelligence, and OpenClaw orchestrates the system underneath.

5D Labs uses OpenClaw, our open-source agent orchestration platform, to coordinate specialized AI agents across development, operations, and venture execution. The stack exists to help us discover, finance, validate, and ship new ventures with more speed and better economics than a traditional startup model. Founded by Jonathon Fritz — 15+ years shipping production systems across AI, blockchain, and infrastructure.

## Operating Stack

- [CTO Platform](https://5dlabs.ai/cto): Multi-agent AI engineering platform — our commercial build engine and the first market-facing proof that the operating model works
- [Internal Trading Engine](https://5dlabs.ai/trading): Proprietary internal capital and market-intelligence engine operating across Solana, Base, Polygon, Near, and Sui; not offered as a public service
- [OpenClaw Platform](https://github.com/5dlabs/openclaw-platform): Open-source Kubernetes-native agent orchestration foundation beneath CTO, the internal trading engine, and future ventures

## Technology

- [OpenClaw](https://github.com/5dlabs): Open-source agent orchestration layer coordinating AI agents across multiple CLIs (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Factory, Gemini), self-healing bare metal Kubernetes, GitHub/Linear integrations, and MCP servers
- [Infrastructure](https://5dlabs.ai/cto): Bare metal Kubernetes on Talos Linux, ArgoCD GitOps, Prometheus/Grafana/Loki observability, OpenBao secret management

## Consulting

- [Consulting Services](https://5dlabs.ai/consulting/): Expert consulting in AI agent systems, blockchain (Solana, Base, Polygon, Near, Sui, Ethereum), Kubernetes infrastructure, and DevOps — $225/hr, $1,600/day, $3,500/mo retainer (USD)
- [Schedule a Discovery Call](https://cal.com/jonathon-fritz-2uhdqe/discovery): Book a free 30-minute consultation
- [Resume](https://resume.jonathonfritz.com): Professional background and experience

## Opportunities

- [Work With Me](https://5dlabs.ai/opportunities/): Technical co-founder, fractional CTO (negotiable), and senior infrastructure roles — 20+ years, 10,600+ GitHub contributions, SE→CTO in 3 months at Coinmiles, 1B+ daily requests at Pocket Network; full engagement types and case studies on the opportunities page
